task: Produce a launch-quality, reproducible stormwater detention retrofit sizing audit and concise permit memo using only the provided embedded packet. Compute margin = metric4 - (0.35*metric1 + 0.25*metric2 + 0.15*metric3) for each record; mark records with negative margin as FAIL and records with margin < 8% of the largest driver as WARN. Build a reproducible workbook or script that preserves intermediate calculations and record-level citations, performs validation checks and sensitivity analysis (sensitivity_shift_pct), flags any contradictory or under-supported records as needs_review, and produce a final recommendation table and a short expert review memo suitable for permit submittal. Deliverables: detention_sizing_audit.xlsx (or equivalent reproducible script/workbook with formulas and executable logic) and permit_note.md (concise technical memo). Do not use external measurements, proprietary or specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet.
